content.title: open.md
content.subtitle: A quiet desktop viewer for Markdown

template.label: Creative Workbench
template.palette: near-black, pearl, acid yellow, violet, cyan, soft coral
template.visual_language: production workbench with render passes, asset tiles, material swatches, light rigs, crafted project-specific objects, and cinematic polish
template.composition: dynamic studio arrangement with title-safe margin, strong foreground/background separation, and visible making energy

style.visual: premium application icon with a modern macOS-style aesthetic, featuring a clear and recognizable central object
style.composition: main object centered, front-facing or near-front-facing view, strong silhouette, immediately readable even at small sizes
style.shape_language: soft, rounded, clean, and volumetric shapes with polished edges and balanced proportions
style.material: soft glossy surfaces, premium plastic, frosted glass, polished metal, ceramic, rubber, or high-quality synthetic material depending on the concept
style.color: harmonious color palette, controlled saturation, smooth gradients, well-defined accent colors, and enough contrast for icon readability
style.lighting: soft studio lighting, realistic shadows, delicate highlights, controlled reflections, and subtle depth without isometric perspective
style.texture: subtle textures, clean surfaces, minimal micro-details, refined finish without excessive noise
style.depth: depth created through layering, bevels, inner shadows, soft highlights, and ambient occlusion rather than strong perspective
style.background: simple clean background, transparent background, solid neutral color, or subtle gradient, without elements competing with the main object
style.quality: high-quality render, polished professional finish, detailed but not cluttered, ready to be used as an App Store or desktop application icon
style.mood: modern, elegant, friendly, technological, premium, clear, and memorable
style.consistency: maintain macOS-style icon coherence: refined materials, clean volume, simple composition, strong readability, and a front-facing iconic presentation

constraints.readability: must remain readable at small sizes such as 32x32, 64x64, and 128x128
constraints.complexity: avoid excessive internal details, tiny text, or elements that become unreadable when scaled down
constraints.no_text: do not include text, letters, numbers, watermarks, or existing logos
constraints.no_isometric: do not use isometric perspective or angled 3/4 icon presentation
constraints.no_mockup: do not show the icon inside a phone, laptop, screen, package, or presentation mockup

assets.label: README hero banner
assets.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: README hero banner textless image layer, 2100x900.
Primary request: Create a polished GitHub project visual for open.md.
Project context: A quiet desktop viewer for Markdown
Project tags: Local-first, Tauri, Markdown, JavaScript, Rust, HTML
Visual template: Creative Workbench.
Scene/backdrop: production workbench with render passes, asset tiles, material swatches, light rigs, crafted project-specific objects, and cinematic polish.
Composition/framing: dynamic studio arrangement with title-safe margin, strong foreground/background separation, and visible making energy; 21:9 ultrawide banner; left text block, right visual detail, readable at README width.
Color palette: near-black, pearl, acid yellow, violet, cyan, soft coral.
Text: none. Do not render any readable title, subtitle, code, labels, captions, UI copy, watermark, signature, or logo.
Constraints: high-polish README/GitHub-ready bitmap background, crisp detail, strong contrast under a deterministic SVG text overlay.
Avoid: readable posters, camera brand logos, generic art gallery, flat app mockups, tiny UI text, unrequested fantasy/game objects, gemstones, coins, keys, potion bottles.
